title: Aeranthes macrostachya
taxonomy: Aeranthes macrostachya is classified within the plant kingdom as a member of the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the order Asparagales, which is a large group of flowering plants that includes orchids and other related species. Further classification within the family Orchidaceae positions Aeranthes macrostachya as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Aeranthes is a small group of orchids, with Aeranthes macrostachya being one of the few species within this genus. By classifying Aeranthes macrostachya within the Orchidaceae family, we can better understand its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
